category_sources: source_facts.description says it documents the Lattice ECP5 bit-stream format; official README says Project Trellis enables an open-source ECP5 FPGA flow.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is "Project Trellis"; ReadTheDocs site title is Project Trellis.
docs_sources: Official README says documentation is published online as HTML; ReadTheDocs Project Trellis site documents ECP5 architecture and libtrellis.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/YosysHQ/prjtrellis, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Lattice ECP5 bit-stream format; official README mentions ECP5 FPGAs, Yosys, nextpnr, device database, and bitstream creation tools.
